creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
After updating kontact to 20.08.0 it crashes on startup with the following core dump.

(lldb) target create "/usr/local/bin/kontact" --core "kontact.core"
Core file '/usr/home/vendion/kontact.core' (x86_64) was loaded.
